tasks.title: Create tests/dsl_tests.rs
tasks.description: Create missing test file for TestDsl module covering all major functionality: construction, with_size(), init_terminal(), with_pty() with command parameter, with_buffer_diff(), with_state_tester(), render(), render_with_state(), fluent API method chaining, capture_buffer(), send_keys(), wait_for(), wait_with_predicates(), poll_until(), buffer_lines(), save_snapshot(), load_snapshot(), load_snapshot_and_assert_eq()
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify TestDsl::new() and TestDsl::default() construct valid instances
AddUnitTest: verify with_size() correctly sets terminal dimensions
AddUnitTest: verify init_terminal() initializes terminal without error
AddUnitTest: verify with_pty() with command parameter creates PTY simulator
AddUnitTest: verify with_buffer_diff() initializes buffer differ
AddUnitTest: verify with_state_tester() initializes state tester
AddUnitTest: verify render() renders widget and captures buffer
AddUnitTest: verify render_with_state() renders with state context
AddUnitTest: verify fluent API method chaining (then, then_result) works
AddUnitTest: verify capture_buffer() retrieves correct buffer content
AddUnitTest: verify send_keys() injects keys to PTY
AddUnitTest: verify wait_for() handles timeout correctly
AddUnitTest: verify wait_with_predicates() handles predicate matching
AddUnitTest: verify poll_until() polls until condition met
AddUnitTest: verify buffer_lines() extracts correct line content
AddUnitTest: verify save_snapshot() persists snapshot to disk
AddUnitTest: verify load_snapshot() loads snapshot from disk
AddUnitTest: verify load_snapshot_and_assert_eq() compares loaded snapshot
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p ratatui-testing dsl_tests passes all tests
tasks.impl_notes: Create new test file at opencode-rust/ratatui-testing/tests/dsl_tests.rs. Use ratatui::backend::TestBackend for rendering tests. Follow existing test patterns in the crate.

tasks.title: Add capture_stdout() and capture_stderr() to CliTester
tasks.description: Add missing fluent methods for stdout/stderr capture configuration in CliTester. These configure output to be captured during run()/spawn().
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify capture_stdout() method exists and returns Self
AddUnitTest: verify capture_stderr() method exists and returns Self
AddUnitTest: verify methods are chainable in fluent API
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p ratatui-testing cli passes all tests
tasks.impl_notes: Add to opencode-rust/ratatui-testing/src/cli.rs. Methods should configure internal flags that are already used in run() and spawn().

tasks.title: Add no-parameter with_pty() to TestDsl
tasks.description: Add with_pty() method without command parameter using default command ['bash', '-c', 'echo ready']. Closes gap FR-DSL-GAP-001.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify with_pty() without parameters creates PTY with default command
AddUnitTest: verify existing with_pty(command) still works correctly
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p ratatui-testing dsl passes all tests
tasks.impl_notes: Add to opencode-rust/ratatui-testing/src/dsl.rs. Use PtySimulator::new() which already has default command logic.

tasks.title: Fix CliTester temp_dir field usage
tasks.description: Fix gap FR-CLI-GAP-001 where temp_dir field is never used. When with_temp_dir() is called, store TempDir and use temp_dir.path() as working_dir in run() and spawn() if no explicit working_dir set.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify temp_dir field is stored when with_temp_dir() called
AddUnitTest: verify run() uses temp_dir.path() when no explicit working_dir set
AddUnitTest: verify spawn() uses temp_dir.path() when no explicit working_dir set
AddUnitTest: verify explicit working_dir overrides temp_dir path
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p ratatui-testing cli passes all tests
tasks.impl_notes: Fix in opencode-rust/ratatui-testing/src/cli.rs. temp_dir field should be Option<TempDir> and used when working_dir is None.

tasks.title: Add StateTester::compare_state() method
tasks.description: Add convenience method to directly compare serializable state. Serialize state to Value, then compare to default snapshot.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify compare_state() accepts serializable state type
AddUnitTest: verify compare_state() returns StateDiff result
AddUnitTest: verify compare_state() with matching state returns empty diff
AddUnitTest: verify compare_state() with different state returns diff
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p ratatui-testing state passes all tests
tasks.impl_notes: Add to opencode-rust/ratatui-testing/src/state.rs. Method signature: pub fn compare_state<S>(&self, state: &S) -> Result<StateDiff> where S: Serialize.

tasks.title: Fix diff_str() to use IgnoreOptions
tasks.description: Fix gap FR-DIFF-GAP-001. Review diff_str() implementation and ensure IgnoreOptions are applied when comparing strings.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify diff_str() applies IgnoreOptions when comparing
AddUnitTest: verify diff_str() with IgnoreOptions ignores specified differences
AddUnitTest: verify diff_str() without IgnoreOptions compares exactly
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p ratatui-testing buffer_diff passes all tests
tasks.impl_notes: Fix in opencode-rust/ratatui-testing/src/diff.rs. Ensure IgnoreOptions are passed through to the underlying diff comparison.

tasks.title: Export ChildProcess from lib.rs
tasks.description: Export ChildProcess type publicly from lib.rs. Add pub use cli::ChildProcess;
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: verify ChildProcess is publicly accessible from crate root
BuildVerification: cargo build -p ratatui-testing succeeds
tasks.impl_notes: Add pub use cli::ChildProcess; to opencode-rust/ratatui-testing/src/lib.rs

tasks.title: Enhance DialogRenderTester
tasks.description: Add more dialog verification methods: has_title(buffer, title) and has_specific_content(buffer, content). Review existing methods for completeness.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify has_title() correctly identifies dialog title
AddUnitTest: verify has_title() returns false for non-matching title
AddUnitTest: verify has_specific_content() finds specific content in buffer
AddUnitTest: verify has_specific_content() returns false when content missing
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p ratatui-testing dialog passes all tests

tasks.title: Fix wait_for to use predicates field
tasks.description: Refactor wait_for to optionally use predicates field. Review implementation and consider integrating predicates field usage. Document if predicates are intentionally separate.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify wait_for() uses predicates when available
AddUnitTest: verify wait_for() works correctly without predicates
AddUnitTest: verify wait_for() returns correct result when predicate matches
AddUnitTest: verify wait_for() handles timeout when predicate never matches
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p ratatui-testing dsl passes all tests
tasks.impl_notes: Review and potentially refactor in opencode-rust/ratatui-testing/src/dsl.rs. Ensure predicates field is properly utilized.

tasks.title: Add Windows platform detection for PTY
tasks.description: Add Windows detection and clear error message. Add #[cfg(windows)] check in PtySimulator::new() returning 'PTY not supported on Windows'. Use #[cfg(unix)] for Unix-specific code.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify #[cfg(windows)] build uses error message for unsupported platform
AddUnitTest: verify #[cfg(unix)] build works normally on Unix platforms
BuildVerification: cargo build --all-features succeeds on Unix
BuildVerification: cargo build --all-features succeeds on Windows (with expected error at runtime)
